name: Apple & Spice Pizza Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and sugars until creamy.
2. Add egg and vanilla; beat again.
3. Stir in dry ingredients until smooth.
4. Mix in apples and oats.
5. Spread mixture evenly on a greased pizza pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and sprinkle with 1 package (6 ounces) of chocolate chips.
8. Let cool slightly, then spread the chocolate chips.
9. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the chocolate.
10. Mix powdered sugar with milk until smooth.
11. Drizzle the glaze over the top of the pizza cookie.
